items.name: 黄金岬の日和山烽火台跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 留萌市大町2丁目（平成元年度に標柱設置）
items.description: 夜になると黄金岬の高台に積まれた薪に火が入れられ、岬から海を照らし、沖行く弁財船の男たちに航海の安全を知らせた。

en.name_en: Site of the Hiyoriyama Signal-Fire Platform at Ogon Cape
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the site of the Hiyoriyama signal-fire platform at Ogon Cape. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Rumoi City, designated on 1999-09-27, located at Omachi 2-chome, Rumoi City (marker post installed in fiscal 1989).

items.name: 三泊漁港遺跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 留萌市三泊町（平成2年度標柱設置）
items.description: 標高2.5m～3mの砂丘上に乗る遺跡。砂丘の形成期は縄文時代前期（約5500年前）あたりと推測される。

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Sandomari fishing port site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Rumoi City, designated on 1999-09-27, located at Sandomari-cho, Rumoi City (marker post installed in fiscal 1990).

items.name: 星兜残欠
items.location: 留萌市大町2丁目（海のふるさと館にて展示中）
items.description: 平安時代末期に作られたといわれる兜。一緒に出土した杏葉（胴丸鎧の肩や腕を守る付属品）も展示。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a fragment of a hoshikabuto (star helmet). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Rumoi City, designated on 1999-09-27, located at Omachi 2-chome, Rumoi City (on display at the Umi no Furusatokan).

items.name: アトゥシ（2点）
items.location: 留萌市大町2丁目（海のふるさと館）【現在、公開しておりません】
items.description: 員数2点。アイヌの樹皮衣で、オヒョウニレの内皮の繊維を撚った糸で織った布で作った服。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of two attush garments woven from tree-bark fiber. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Rumoi City, designated on 1999-09-27, located at Omachi 2-chome, Rumoi City (Umi no Furusatokan; not currently open to the public).

items.name: 旧五十嵐億太郎邸跡地
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 留萌市特別功労者五十嵐億太郎の邸宅があった場所で、昭和43年（1968）に旧留萌湊神社が建設された場所。留萌の歴史を語る史跡。

en.name_en: Site of the Former Igarashi Okutaro Residence
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the site of the former Igarashi Okutaro residence. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Rumoi City, designated on 2017-05-16, located within Omachi 3-chome 37-2, Rumoi City.
